title: Apparent Death.
content:
WEEP, maiden, weep here o'er the tomb of Love;

    He died of nothing by mere chance was slain.
    But is he really dead? oh, that I cannot prove:

    A nothing, a mere chance, oft gives him life again.
meaning: About: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe was a German writer and according to George Eliot, "Germany's greatest man of letters� and the last true polymath to walk the earth." Goethe's works span the fields of poetry, drama, literature, theology, humanism, and science.
